channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Democrats clash with US Energy Secretary over Iran war and gas prices
item.description: Watch the moment a Democratic congresswoman tells the US Energy Secretary he is ‘living in a different world’.

item.title: Pakistan expecting ‘major breakthrough’ tied to Iran’s nuclear programme
item.description: A source has told Al Jazeera that Pakistan is expecting a breakthrough tied to Iran’s nuclear programme.

item.title: Iran war live: Pakistan in push for new round of US-Iran peace negotiations
item.description: At least 2,167 people have been killed and more than 7,000 injured in Israeli attacks on Lebanon since March 2.

item.title: US Senate rejects another war powers resolution to limit Trump on Iran
item.description: Fourth Senate War Powers vote - first since Trump threatened to destroy Iranian civilisation - fails to gain traction.

item.title: Pakistani army chief in Tehran amid bid to restart US talks
item.description: Pakistan’s army chief has arrived in Iran for high-level talks aimed at reviving negotiations between Iran and the US.

item.title: Pakistan army chief in Tehran to advance next round of US-Iran talks
item.description: Sources tell Al Jazeera that Pakistani mediators are hopeful about a breakthrough on Iran's nuclear programme.

item.title: Pope Leo visits Cameroon with message of peace amid attacks from Trump
item.description: US President Donald Trump has lashed out at pope over calls for peace and criticism of US war on Iran.

item.title: Lyse Doucet: Under fragile ceasefire, Iranians wonder if US deal can be done
item.description: The BBC's chief international correspondent reports from Iran as diplomatic efforts to avoid a return to war intensify.

item.title: Frank Gardner: What is China's role in the Iran war?
item.description: BBC Security Correspondent Frank Gardner explains how the world's second-largest economy fits into the Gulf conflict.

item.title: Nine killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
item.description: Eight students and one teacher died in the attack, according to Interior Minister Mustafa Cifci.
